description_long: This is a two-story brick warehouse with a weathered, dark brown facade and large, arched entryways on the ground floor. The front features three prominent arched doorways and four rectangular windows above, with a central upper window that is divided into three panes. The side and rear walls are solid brick with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing security and storage functionality. The interior appears hollow and unfinished, with visible brick flooring and open access through the front arches. The building's exterior is characterized by a rough, aged brick texture, giving it an industrial, utilitarian appearance. There are no visible signs, loading docks, or decorative elements, and the roof is flat with a raised central section above the front facade.
description: A weathered, two-story brick warehouse with arched front entryways and a flat roof, featuring a rough, industrial appearance.
description_view_0: The front view shows three large arched doorways, four upper windows, and a central raised window section, highlighting the main entry and facade details.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a solid brick wall with no windows or doors, emphasizing the building's secure, utilitarian design.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain brick wall with three upper window openings and a raised central section, lacking any entry points.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a featureless brick wall with no openings or architectural details.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade is constructed from dark, weathered brick with three large arched entryways on the ground floor and four rectangular windows above, including a central window divided into three panes. The design is simple and functional, with no decorative elements or signage, emphasizing industrial utility.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is flat with a raised central section above the front facade, constructed from the same brick material as the rest of the building and lacking any visible skylights or rooftop equipment.
